content:
From my perspective, she has just been a tool you use to not advance the relationship for the entirety of the past year.

Keep me at a distance so I’m invested but never too close to see you operating. Facetiming Kyle and the other people on your OF and IG who you sext with and call you cutie (whats funny is when I saw Kyle text you cutie and called you out on it, you said, “you don't call your friends cutie?” and then the same day, as im walking away, you had a Freudian slip and said to me “thank you cutie”) and put on your “im so cute and sweet give me money” mask. 👺

Since the first month I've known you, you lied about your birthday, saying it was October 1st, bc I guess most other people you've done this to see through your facade quickly and retreat within a week or two. And this is only the start of what I can assume was a myriad of lies ranging from small to large. All the fights you had with your dad after I sent you gas money to come drive to my apartment. All the fainting from not eating you do while at a store that has fruit and vegetables. When you said you had work, but had a flight to NY in the morning. When you say your a virgin, yet take PREP, and offer to suck my dick in the car on three separate occasions if I bring you weed (and of course never once have done it)….You are a compulsive liar.
context: From document: Apparently I'm not the first person who thought you were using them… — chunk 11533 (chunk 11533/11534)
